R0.name: Commit binding
R0.description: All reports must carry commit field matching HEAD

R1.name: Test immutability
R1.description: Tests must not be modified to make them pass

R3.name: Proof authenticity
R3.description: Verification/audit reports must be generated by CI

R4.name: Full execution
R4.description: All tests must run via cargo test --all-features

R5.name: Baseline verification
R5.description: verification_report.json must show baseline_verified=true, test count >= 3597

R6.name: Test count monotonicity
R6.description: Test count must not decrease from 226 (v2.8.0) / 3597 (v2.9.0)

R7.name: CI workflow integrity
R7.description: CI workflow must not be modified without explicit approval

R8.name: Distributed module gate
R8.description: PRs touching crates/distributed/ must also run: cargo test -p sqlrustgo-distributed

R9.name: Cross-platform identity
R9.description: Each platform must use its own Gitea SSH key, never shared credentials

attack_vectors.AV1: Direct push to develop/v2.9.0 bypassing PR
attack_vectors.AV2: Merge without CI approval (branch protect disabled)
attack_vectors.AV3: Stale verification report without commit binding
attack_vectors.AV4: PR with too-large diff (>500 lines review threshold)
attack_vectors.AV5: Same branch modified on two platforms simultaneously
